judgment.summary: Fast-growing cloud security provider with strong revenue growth and free cash flow, but currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 12.6%; next earnings date is 2026-05-26.
positives: Revenue growth 25.9% YoY — indicating strong market adoption.
Free cash flow $1.02B TTM — positive cash generation supports operations.
Gross margin 76.6% — healthy margin on services.
Forward P/E 36.96x — reflects high growth expectations.
Consensus rating is strong buy with a high mean target price.
negatives: Operating margin -6.2% and Profit margin -2.3% — the company is not yet GAAP profitable.
Return on equity -3.6% and Return on assets -1.4% — negative returns highlight unprofitability.
Debt/Equity 85.00 — leverage is significant, though offset by substantial cash.

news.paragraph: With no recent headlines, Zscaler's (ZS) price action is likely to be driven by its fundamentals and upcoming earnings report. The company is expected to report its latest quarterly results on May 26th. Traders should monitor analyst sentiment and the forward-looking guidance provided in the upcoming earnings call.
